originalTitle: Trump to undergo annual medical exam ahead of 80th birthday
summary: The BBC’s Bernd Debusmann explains the routine medical check of the president of the US.
content:
President Trump is scheduled to visit the Walter Reed National Military Medical Center on Tuesday for an annual medical exam ahead of his 80th birthday on June 14.

Trump's previous annual check-up was in April 2025.

Back in October 2025, he told the press he had an MRI scan. A memo written by Captain Sean Barbabella said that advanced imaging of the president's heart and abdomen had come back "perfectly normal".

The BBC's White House Reporter, Bernd Debusmann Jr., shared more insights on the annual exam.

chineseTitle: 特朗普将在80岁生日前接受年度体检
chineseSummary: BBC 的贝恩德·德布斯曼 (Bernd Debusmann) 解释了美国总统的例行体检。
chineseContent:
特朗普总统定于周二前往沃尔特·里德国家军事医疗中心，在 6 月 14 日他的 80 岁生日之前进行年度体检。

特朗普上一次年度体检是在2025年4月。

早在 2025 年 10 月，他就告诉媒体他做了核磁共振扫描。肖恩·巴巴贝拉上尉撰写的一份备忘录称，总统心脏和腹部的高级成像已恢复“完全正常”。

BBC 白宫记者 Bernd Debusmann Jr. 分享了有关年度考试的更多见解。
